title: cordyloblaste scortechinii
intro: Cordyloblaste scortechinii, also known as the Taiwan cordia, is a plant species in the balsa family (Bombacaceae) native to Taiwan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Cordyloblaste scortechinii include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
